name: Chocolate Mosaic Fruit Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix the Ghirardelli Semi-Sweet chocolate with powdered sugar, slivered almonds, flour, cold butter, and salt until well combined.
3. Press the mixture into a tart pan lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
5. Allow to cool completely before adding fruit toppings.
6. Arrange sliced fruits in mosaic patterns on top of the cooled crust.
7. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours before serving.
